goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...

No Codex app-server runtime.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
regression: adjacent surface still works

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

goals.title: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools,...
goals.objective: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools, MCP, and ggui into profile-gated capability modules. Main receives allowed tools/MCP/ggui; EXAONE receives no tool specs and no MCP. ggui attachments render inline inside assistant answer bubbles and support multiple dynamic surfaces with provenance/error states.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: fake MCP + ggui turn; capture main provider receiving allowed MCP/ggui tools and response containing multiple inline gguiAttachments with provenance.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

before.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

goals.title: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools,...
goals.objective: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools, MCP, and ggui into profile-gated capability modules. Main receives allowed tools/MCP/ggui; EXAONE receives no tool specs and no MCP. ggui attachments render inline inside assistant answer bubbles and support multiple dynamic surfaces with provenance/error states.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: fake MCP + ggui turn; capture main provider receiving allowed MCP/ggui tools and response containing multiple inline gguiAttachments with provenance.
HTTP call: fake EXAONE model returns tool_calls; capture no tool execution, no MCP discovery, and PROFILE_TOOL_CALL_BLOCKED debug event.
Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, send a dynamic UI request, capture screenshot showing ggui rendered inside assistant bubble, not bottom panel.

before.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

goals.title: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools,...
goals.objective: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools, MCP, and ggui into profile-gated capability modules. Main receives allowed tools/MCP/ggui; EXAONE receives no tool specs and no MCP. ggui attachments render inline inside assistant answer bubbles and support multiple dynamic surfaces with provenance/error states.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: fake MCP + ggui turn; capture main provider receiving allowed MCP/ggui tools and response containing multiple inline gguiAttachments with provenance.
HTTP call: fake EXAONE model returns tool_calls; capture no tool execution, no MCP discovery, and PROFILE_TOOL_CALL_BLOCKED debug event.
Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, send a dynamic UI request, capture screenshot showing ggui rendered inside assistant bubble, not bottom panel.

goals.title: Self-improvement, hook safety, and prompt/skill evolution. Make self-...
goals.objective: Self-improvement, hook safety, and prompt/skill evolution. Make self-improvement a first-class internal engine subsystem covering skill evolution, hook evolution, workflow/node spec evolution, and both profile system prompts. Codex app-server may only be used as isolated implementer, not runtime. Hook failures become diagnostic evidence and never crash /turn.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: stage self-improvement candidates for skill, hook, workflow/node spec, main prompt, and exaone prompt; capture versioned artifacts and rollback metadata.

HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

goals.title: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools,...
goals.objective: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools, MCP, and ggui into profile-gated capability modules. Main receives allowed tools/MCP/ggui; EXAONE receives no tool specs and no MCP. ggui attachments render inline inside assistant answer bubbles and support multiple dynamic surfaces with provenance/error states.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: fake MCP + ggui turn; capture main provider receiving allowed MCP/ggui tools and response containing multiple inline gguiAttachments with provenance.
HTTP call: fake EXAONE model returns tool_calls; capture no tool execution, no MCP discovery, and PROFILE_TOOL_CALL_BLOCKED debug event.
Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, send a dynamic UI request, capture screenshot showing ggui rendered inside assistant bubble, not bottom panel.

after.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

goals.title: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools,...
goals.objective: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools, MCP, and ggui into profile-gated capability modules. Main receives allowed tools/MCP/ggui; EXAONE receives no tool specs and no MCP. ggui attachments render inline inside assistant answer bubbles and support multiple dynamic surfaces with provenance/error states.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: fake MCP + ggui turn; capture main provider receiving allowed MCP/ggui tools and response containing multiple inline gguiAttachments with provenance.
HTTP call: fake EXAONE model returns tool_calls; capture no tool execution, no MCP discovery, and PROFILE_TOOL_CALL_BLOCKED debug event.
Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, send a dynamic UI request, capture screenshot showing ggui rendered inside assistant bubble, not bottom panel.

goals.title: Self-improvement, hook safety, and prompt/skill evolution. Make self-...
goals.objective: Self-improvement, hook safety, and prompt/skill evolution. Make self-improvement a first-class internal engine subsystem covering skill evolution, hook evolution, workflow/node spec evolution, and both profile system prompts. Codex app-server may only be used as isolated implementer, not runtime. Hook failures become diagnostic evidence and never crash /turn.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: stage self-improvement candidates for skill, hook, workflow/node spec, main prompt, and exaone prompt; capture versioned artifacts and rollback metadata.
HTTP call: run /turn with Codex implementer unavailable and a throwing hook; capture successful /turn plus diagnostic hook evidence, no crash.
tmux: run existing self-improvement registry smoke publish/rollback tests and capture before/after/rollback state.

goals.objective: Browser microphone Voice and Pretext responsive UI. Replace upload-style Voice with microphone getUserMedia/MediaRecorder into whisper.cpp transcription. Improve the chat-first UI using @chenglou/pretext for real text measurement/layout stability, responsive compact layout, debug inspector, and inline ggui.

before.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

goals.title: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools,...
goals.objective: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools, MCP, and ggui into profile-gated capability modules. Main receives allowed tools/MCP/ggui; EXAONE receives no tool specs and no MCP. ggui attachments render inline inside assistant answer bubbles and support multiple dynamic surfaces with provenance/error states.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: fake MCP + ggui turn; capture main provider receiving allowed MCP/ggui tools and response containing multiple inline gguiAttachments with provenance.
HTTP call: fake EXAONE model returns tool_calls; capture no tool execution, no MCP discovery, and PROFILE_TOOL_CALL_BLOCKED debug event.
Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, send a dynamic UI request, capture screenshot showing ggui rendered inside assistant bubble, not bottom panel.

goals.title: Self-improvement, hook safety, and prompt/skill evolution. Make self-...
goals.objective: Self-improvement, hook safety, and prompt/skill evolution. Make self-improvement a first-class internal engine subsystem covering skill evolution, hook evolution, workflow/node spec evolution, and both profile system prompts. Codex app-server may only be used as isolated implementer, not runtime. Hook failures become diagnostic evidence and never crash /turn.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: stage self-improvement candidates for skill, hook, workflow/node spec, main prompt, and exaone prompt; capture versioned artifacts and rollback metadata.
HTTP call: run /turn with Codex implementer unavailable and a throwing hook; capture successful /turn plus diagnostic hook evidence, no crash.
tmux: run existing self-improvement registry smoke publish/rollback tests and capture before/after/rollback state.

goals.title: Browser microphone Voice and Pretext responsive UI. Replace upload-st...
goals.objective: Browser microphone Voice and Pretext responsive UI. Replace upload-style Voice with microphone getUserMedia/MediaRecorder into whisper.cpp transcription. Improve the chat-first UI using @chenglou/pretext for real text measurement/layout stability, responsive compact layout, debug inspector, and inline ggui.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, use fake microphone stream through Voice button, stop recording, capture transcript populated in input without auto-send.
Browser use: deny getUserMedia and simulate missing Intl.Segmenter/Canvas measurement; capture Korean permission error and Pretext fallback without crash.
Browser use: mobile and desktop viewport screenshots after long Korean/English mixed answer; capture compact responsive layout with no overlaps and debug inspector secondary.

goals.title: Final docs, real E2E, and quality gate. Update docs/config and run re...
goals.objective: Final docs, real E2E, and quality gate. Update docs/config and run real verification: gateway tests, client check, Expo web export, Browser-plugin E2E, LM Studio EXAONE route, model switching, compaction evidence, profile gating, inline ggui, microphone voice, and resource cleanup. No standalone Playwright.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: Final docs, real E2E, and quality gate. Update docs/config and run real verif...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 7.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: Final docs, real E2E, and quality gate. Update docs/config and run real verif....

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: stage self-improvement candidates for skill, hook, workflow/node spec, main prompt, and exaone prompt; capture versioned artifacts and rollback metadata.

tmux: run existing self-improvement registry smoke publish/rollback tests and capture before/after/rollback state.

goals.title: Browser microphone Voice and Pretext responsive UI. Replace upload-st...
goals.objective: Browser microphone Voice and Pretext responsive UI. Replace upload-style Voice with microphone getUserMedia/MediaRecorder into whisper.cpp transcription. successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, use fake microphone stream through Voice button, stop recording, capture transcript populated in input without auto-send.

Browser use: mobile and desktop viewport screenshots after long Korean/English mixed answer; capture compact responsive layout with no overlaps and debug inspector secondary.

goals.title: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs...
goals.objective: Codex parity and engine profile foundation. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

goals.objective: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools, MCP, and ggui into profile-gated capability modules. Implement and verify docs/codex-runtime-parity.md plus an AgentProfileRegistry for main-agent and exaone-agent. main-agent enables tools/MCP/ggui/reasoning memory/self-improvement signals. exaone-agent uses the same engine profile schema but disables tools/MCP/ggui execution and uses expression memory plus the emotional model route. No Codex app-server runtime.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: create Codex parity matrix and profile registry, then run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/engine-profile.test.js; dump command transcript.
tmux: start gateway with invalid profile config and capture typed startup/config error, proving malformed profile is rejected.
HTTP call: POST /turn with toolMode disabled regression fixture and confirm existing disabled-tool behavior still works after registry introduction.

goals.title: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle....
goals.objective: Context memory, token accounting, compaction, and resource lifecycle. Implement per-conversation memory files with manifest/journal/locks/redaction, context replay, token accounting, compaction threshold 0.9 of max context with pre-turn and mid-turn checks, and TurnResourceManager cancellation/timeout/cleanup/shutdown behavior.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: configure OBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW_TOKENS=1000 and OBA_CONTEXT_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD=0.9, send same conversation turns totaling >900 estimated tokens, capture /turn debug showing compaction summary and context revision.
tmux: run two concurrent same-conversation /turn calls and a corrupt conversation file case; capture serialization/typed error and no corrupted write.
tmux: cancel a hung fake provider turn, then capture resource report proving provider abort, timer cleanup, and no leftover temp/process state.

goals.title: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /tu...
goals.objective: Shared profiled engine and main-to-EXAONE orchestration. Refactor /turn so both main-agent and exaone-agent run through one shared profiled engine entrypoint. Main runs first, EXAONE runs second via LM Studio + exaone-4.0-1.2b by default, and model routing is swappable by env/config.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: POST /turn against fake main provider and fake LM Studio; capture debug showing runProfiledAgentTurn(main-agent) then runProfiledAgentTurn(exaone-agent), same engine module, final EXAONE answer.
tmux: run /turn with unsupported emotional provider/model config and capture typed config/provider error without partial runtime startup.
HTTP call: switch OBA_EMOTIONAL_MODEL_NAME=test-model and capture fake LM Studio request body using test-model while main provider behavior remains unchanged.

goals.title: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools,...
goals.objective: Capability gating and dynamic ggui inline attachments. Convert tools, MCP, and ggui into profile-gated capability modules. Main receives allowed tools/MCP/ggui; EXAONE receives no tool specs and no MCP. ggui attachments render inline inside assistant answer bubbles and support multiple dynamic surfaces with provenance/error states.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: fake MCP + ggui turn; capture main provider receiving allowed MCP/ggui tools and response containing multiple inline gguiAttachments with provenance.
HTTP call: fake EXAONE model returns tool_calls; capture no tool execution, no MCP discovery, and PROFILE_TOOL_CALL_BLOCKED debug event.
Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, send a dynamic UI request, capture screenshot showing ggui rendered inside assistant bubble, not bottom panel.

goals.title: Self-improvement, hook safety, and prompt/skill evolution. Make self-...
goals.objective: Self-improvement, hook safety, and prompt/skill evolution. Make self-improvement a first-class internal engine subsystem covering skill evolution, hook evolution, workflow/node spec evolution, and both profile system prompts. Codex app-server may only be used as isolated implementer, not runtime. Hook failures become diagnostic evidence and never crash /turn.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/tmux: stage self-improvement candidates for skill, hook, workflow/node spec, main prompt, and exaone prompt; capture versioned artifacts and rollback metadata.
HTTP call: run /turn with Codex implementer unavailable and a throwing hook; capture successful /turn plus diagnostic hook evidence, no crash.
tmux: run existing self-improvement registry smoke publish/rollback tests and capture before/after/rollback state.

goals.title: Browser microphone Voice and Pretext responsive UI. Replace upload-st...
goals.objective: Browser microphone Voice and Pretext responsive UI. Replace upload-style Voice with microphone getUserMedia/MediaRecorder into whisper.cpp transcription. Improve the chat-first UI using @chenglou/pretext for real text measurement/layout stability, responsive compact layout, debug inspector, and inline ggui.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: open http://127.0.0.1:8081/, use fake microphone stream through Voice button, stop recording, capture transcript populated in input without auto-send.
Browser use: deny getUserMedia and simulate missing Intl.Segmenter/Canvas measurement; capture Korean permission error and Pretext fallback without crash.
Browser use: mobile and desktop viewport screenshots after long Korean/English mixed answer; capture compact responsive layout with no overlaps and debug inspector secondary.

goals.title: Final docs, real E2E, and quality gate. Update docs/config and run re...
goals.objective: Final docs, real E2E, and quality gate. Update docs/config and run real verification: gateway tests, client check, Expo web export, Browser-plugin E2E, LM Studio EXAONE route, model switching, compaction evidence, profile gating, inline ggui, microphone voice, and resource cleanup. No standalone Playwright.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux: run node --test services/agent-gateway/test/*.test.js services/agent-gateway/test/*.test.mjs, npm --prefix apps/client run check, and npx expo export --platform web --output-dir /tmp/oba-client-web-profiled-engine; capture transcript.
HTTP call + Browser use: real/fake local E2E covers profile gating, compaction debug, LM Studio EXAONE route, model switching, inline ggui, Voice, and cleanup receipts.
regression: adjacent surface still works
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Final docs, real E2E, and quality gate. Update docs/config and run real verif....
